Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_872c78a6-7e93-453a-a3f3-31cc2e647550","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_872c78a6-7e93-453a-a3f3-31cc2e647550"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"bed79eee-4635-4547-a3d4-ef3a445a035c"},"authorEmail":"cstapels@mathworks.com","authorName":"CJ Stapels","authorOrganization":"MathWorks","description":"Read and plot up to 8 ThingSpeak fields of IoT data in two modes: Time Compare (overlay recent vs. historical data) and Channel Compare (stack fields from multiple channels). Controls auto-update the plot on change. Includes retime support, dark mode, channel persistence across sessions, and export to workspace.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_872c78a6-7e93-453a-a3f3-31cc2e647550","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_872c78a6-7e93-453a-a3f3-31cc2e647550"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"70d536a9-1047-4bfd-98cc-200409ae942f"},"outputFileName":"IoT Data Explorer for ThingSpeak using MATLAB.mltbx","outputFolder":"/","summary":"Visualize and compare IoT data from ThingSpeak with auto-updating controls, dark mode, and persistent settings.","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_872c78a6-7e93-453a-a3f3-31cc2e647550","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_872c78a6-7e93-453a-a3f3-31cc2e647550"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"f65dd212-fe82-4561-8740-e047cab02055"},"toolboxName":"IoT Data Explorer for ThingSpeak using MATLAB","toolboxVersion":"2.0","uniqueId":"8feb82c8-c7ae-4a15-aae2-54422b464bea"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"0ad90680-720f-4154-8b5e-c0f773d089da"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"a7def36f-de96-43a2-b144-a6757d641e99"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
